data.title: VMS partners with City of Louisville Metro Govt to modernize impound ops, support beautification efforts.
data.description: Louisville, Kentucky - Vehicle Management Solutions (VMS), a company owned by Mill Point Capital LLC, has joined forces with the City of Louisville Metro Government to enhance the city’s impound operations and optimize abandoned-vehicle removal processes. This initiative aims to improve services for residents in Jefferson County. Endorsed by Louisville’s leadership, this collaboration signifies a concerted effort to enhance public services.

data.title: Coinbase pulls support for crypto bill on eve of crucial Senate vote.
data.description: In recent news, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has increased by 2% in the past month, reaching a total of 6%. This rise in unemployment has been attributed to the economic downturn caused by the global pandemic. Additionally, the number of new jobless claims has also seen a significant increase, with over 500,000 people filing for unemployment benefits last week alone. The government has announced plans to provide financial assistance to those affected by job loss, with a relief package of $2 billion being allocated for this purpose. It is hoped that these measures will help to alleviate the financial strain faced by many individuals and families during this challenging time.

data.title: Teamsters monitoring proposed Allegiant-Sun Country merger for labor standards. Washington, Jan. 14, 2026.
data.description: The International Brotherhood of Teamsters is closely observing the recently announced merger between Allegiant Air and Sun Country Airlines. The union emphasizes the importance of robust labor standards and effective protections in any potential agreement. This development was disclosed on Jan. 14, 2026, without specifying the source.

data.title: Arista Networks stock hit a record high, showing renewed strength with a Relative Strength Rating upgrade, indicating improving technical performance.
data.description: A recent upgrade in Relative Strength Rating for Arista Networks indicates an enhancement in technical performance. The stock of Arista recently reached a record high, showcasing renewed strength. The potential continuation of this positive momentum is a topic of interest for investors, as the company demonstrates signs of improved performance.
Mining company Alamos Gold announces its 2025 production numbers for the fourth quarter and full year.

data.title: Constant Contact acquires GURU Conference and Education Assets. Founder Jay Schwedelson becomes Brand Ambassador.
data.description: Jay Schwedelson, the founder of GURU Media Hub, is set to take on the role of Brand Ambassador for Constant Contact. This move comes as Constant Contact, a comprehensive digital marketing platform popular among small businesses and nonprofits, revealed its acquisition of specific assets. The announcement was made in Waltham, Mass., on Jan. 14, 2026. This platform is utilized by thousands of organizations for their marketing needs.

data.title: Realty ONE Group remains top real estate franchise for 5th year in a row according to Entrepreneur's Franchise 500.
data.description: In Laguna Niguel, California on January 14, 2026, Realty ONE Group International, a fast-growing real estate franchisor, secured the top spot in the real estate category in Entrepreneur's rankings. Known for their modern, purpose-driven approach, the company stands as a leading lifestyle brand in the industry.

data.title: Enerflex Ltd. will release Q4 results on Feb 26, 2026 for the year ended Dec 31, 2025 on global news platforms.
data.description: Enerflex Ltd., a leading company listed on both TSX (EFX) and NYSE (EFXT), is set to announce its financial performance and operational achievements for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2025. The report is scheduled for release on Thursday, February 26, 2026, before the market opens. Interested parties can access the detailed results through a news release on the company's website, www.enerflex.com, as well as on SEDAR+ and EDGAR platforms at www.sedarplus.ca and www.sec.gov/edgar.

data.title: AJOVY® significantly reduced migraine/headache days in children. NEJM published pivotal Phase 3 data. FDA approved for ages 6-17.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, Teva Pharmaceuticals, a U.S. affiliate of Teva Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd., announced that the New England Journal of Medicine has released Phase 3 data on AJOVY. The study focused on children and adolescents with episodic migraines, showing the drug's effectiveness and safety. This data, obtained from the SPACE study, backed the FDA's approval of AJOVY for preventing episodic migraines in pediatric patients aged 6-17 years who weigh 45 kilograms (99 pounds) or more. AJOVY is now the first and sole calcitonin gene-related peptide (CGRP) antagonist approved for preventing episodic migraines in children and adults.

data.title: T2 and PlusAI join forces to launch Level 4 autonomous trucks in Japan, as PlusAI plans to go public through a merger with Churchill Capital Corp IX.
data.description: In Tokyo and Santa Clara, California, PlusAI and T2 Inc. have revealed a key collaboration to introduce Level 4 autonomous trucks to Japan. This partnership was unveiled alongside PlusAI's intention to go public through a merger with Churchill Capital Corp IX (Nasdaq: CCIX). The venture merges T2's expertise in technology design and logistics operation in Japan with PlusAI's successful track record of deploying autonomous trucks for commercial use.

data.title: Stattus4 wins 2026 Zayed Sustainability Prize in Water category in Abu Dhabi.
data.description: Stattus4 has been awarded the prestigious 2026 Zayed Sustainability Prize in the Water category at the ceremony held in Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates. This accolade recognizes excellence in sustainability initiatives and solutions. The Zayed Sustainability Prize, with a global reach, highlights innovative projects addressing environmental challenges. Stattus4's victory underscores their significant contribution to the water sector's sustainability.

data.title: Haivision reports Q4 and full year results for 2025; provider of video networking solutions.
data.description: In Montreal on January 14, 2026, Haivision Systems Inc. (TSX: HAI), a prominent global supplier of real-time video networking and visual collaboration solutions, revealed its fourth-quarter and full-year performance figures.

data.title: Ecco the Dolphin, iconic game from 1992, returns as A&R Atelier announces development. Reports mention critical acclaim.
data.description: Famed explorer of the ocean depths, Ecco the Dolphin, is making a comeback as announced by A&R Atelier on January 14, 2026, in HALF MOON BAY, California. The beloved game, originally launched in 1992, achieved great success both critically and commercially. The return of Ecco the Dolphin is highly anticipated by fans who remember its impact from nearly three decades ago.

data.title: Billionaire investor Dan Loeb's Third Point LLC sold its entire 300,000 shares stake in Workday in Q3 2025, marking its second full exit after Q1 of the same year. Workday reported third-quarter FY26 earnings of $2.32 EPS and a revenue of $2.43 billion, beating estimates of $2.18 EPS and $2.41 billion revenue. Subscription revenue backlog stood at $8.21 billion, up 17.6% YoY.
data.description: In the third quarter of 2025, activist investor Dan Loeb's Third Point LLC completely sold off its stake in software company Workday, Inc. (NASDAQ: WDAY). The hedge fund liquidated its remaining 300,000 shares during this period, marking its second complete exit from Workday in 2025 as it had previously divested in Q1. Workday reported third-quarter FY26 earnings in November, with adjusted earnings per share at $2.32, surpassing the estimated $2.18, alongside revenue of $2.43 billion, exceeding the consensus estimate of $2.41 billion. The company closed the quarter with a 12-month subscription revenue backlog of $8.21 billion, reflecting a 17.6% year-over-year increase, partly driven by the acquisition of Paradox.
Initial reports of possible explosions in the Iranian capital of Tehran.
US money-market fund assets down $30.63 bln for week ended Jan. 13th - iMoneyNet.

data.title: Newark School of Fashion & Design seeks Department Chair for Visual & Performing Arts in leadership role. Accepting applications. Jan. 14, 2026.
data.description: Newark School of Fashion & Design (NSFD) based in Newark, New Jersey is seeking applications for a Department Chairperson for Visual and Design to lead and play a crucial role in shaping the innovative creative-arts school. This position will be pivotal in guiding the Fashion & Design program at NSFD, which stands as one of the most prominent in the region. Interested candidates can apply for this leadership role, which will spearhead the development and implementation of strategies to enhance the academic and creative aspect of the program. The deadline for applications is open until January 14, 2026.

data.title: Faafu Atoll Education Center wins Zayed Sustainability Prize 2026 in Global High Schools - South Asia category.
data.description: In Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates, the Faafu Atoll Education Center has been awarded the prestigious 2026 Zayed Sustainability Prize in the Global High Schools – South Asia category. This recognition signifies the school's outstanding commitment to sustainability and innovation. The prize serves as a platform to showcase the center's achievements in promoting sustainability initiatives within the region. This accolade is a testament to the school's dedication to creating a positive impact on the environment and society.
